Dashboard Archive: 2026-07-01 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data reveals two exceptional long-term performers dominating the ranking. ADTTF ranks #1 with a remarkable 10-year return of 9,593%, though its 10-year to 5-year ratio of 13.04 suggests most gains concentrated in the distant past rather than recent momentum. ELA shows more balanced acceleration across timeframes, with a 339.87% 1-year return and a 3-month to 1-month ratio of 5.04, indicating stronger recent momentum than ADTTF. Both securities pass all four ratio thresholds and trade above their 30/50/100/200-day moving averages, signaling technical strength. The key distinction is recency: while ADTTF has crushed long-term returns versus SPY (163.4% outperformance over 10 years), ELA's current performance metrics suggest more sustained upward acceleration in the present trading environment.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
